defs: A short sled, mostly used as one of a pair connected by a reach or coupling; also, the compound sled so formed.
quotes: The long wagon body set on bobsleds.

defs: a long racing sled (for 2 or more people), having two pairs of runners, with the front pair connected to a steering mechanism. They are usually raced one at a time down a steeply sloping path or specially constructed chute, with sharp banked curves, and attain high speeds.
